isi.lyrics:
Lyric CHAEYOUNG (TWICE) - BAND-AID

Romanization

Need you close right here
I've been patient after all these years
So let me know right now
Can I count on you to hold me down
Stick you like a Band-aid
Keep you around me
Could you be my Band-aid
Even when you hurt me
And be my Band-aid (Hold me tight)
Need you around me
(Every time don't do me wrong)
Can you be my Band-aid (Hold me tight)
Even when you hurt me
Dialing 119 baby
You just bumped my mind baby
Pick the pieces off the floor
You're irreplaceable
Why don't you come and meet me at the door baby

isi.lyrics:
Lyric CHAEYOUNG (TWICE) - AVOCADO(feat.Gliiico)

Romanization

Let’s call it ‘Strawberry’, ‘Blueberry’
I see it growing on the ground
You look like a bad one
Avocado
I gotta hide it underground
Feeling like a dream baby
It’s alright
I decided now
I’ve come to wonderland
No looking back
Why would I look back now
“Believe me
Deceive me
See me as yours”
“Believe me
Try me
And bite me just once”

Hangeul

Let’s call it ‘Strawberry’, ‘Blueberry’
I see it growing on the ground
You look like a bad one
Avocado
I gotta hide it underground
Feeling like a dream baby
It’s alright
I decided now
I’ve come to wonderland
No looking back
Why would I look back now
“Believe me
Deceive me
See me as yours”
“Believe me
Try me
And bite me just once”
